'''C-D20''' was an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Translator droid/Legends|translator droid]] paired with [[R2-RD]] on assignment to [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Dauntarist]] aboard a new [[HT-2200 medium freighter]].<ref name="ABGTAS" />

{{Droid-stub}}
